title: Small Creatures, Big Mission: Bugapalooza Connects Science to Military Readiness
description: Nearly 400 visitors attended the National Museum of Health and Medicine's Bugapalooza to learn how insects affect health, support the environment and affect military readiness.

body.text: Navy Lt. Cmdr. Jodi Fiorenzano, right, Armed Forces Pest Management Board chief of research, leads visitors through an activity during Bugapalooza at the National Museum of Health and Medicine in Silver Spring, Md., June 13, 2026.
